zh.Ryme Instrinseca, Dorset, England: 英國多瑟特音斯特林瑟卡
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Whalesburgh於大約1328年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾時，她的父親Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight15歲，母親Joan de Bodrugan20歲。她於1340年與John de Beauchamp在英國多瑟特音斯特林瑟卡結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1412年在英國戴文金斯布利其享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Whalesburgh于大约1328年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾时，她的父亲Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight15岁，母亲Joan de Bodrugan20岁。她于1340年与John de Beauchamp在英国多瑟特音斯特林瑟卡结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1412年在英国戴文金斯布利其享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Whalesburgh was born about 1328, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight, was 15 and her mother, Joan de Bodrugan, was 20. She married John de Beauchamp in 1340, in Ryme Instrinseca, Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1412, in Kingsbridge, Devon, England, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Whalesburgh est née environ 1328, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Joan de Bodrugan, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John de Beauchamp en 1340, à Ryme Instrinseca, Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1412, à Kingsbridge, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Whalesburgh um 1328 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight 15 und ihre Mutter Joan de Bodrugan 20. Sie hat 1340 in Ryme Instrinseca, Dorset, England John de Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1412 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Kingsbridge, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Whalesburgh è nata il circa 1328 nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Joan de Bodrugan, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John de Beauchamp nel 1340, nel Ryme Instrinseca, Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1412, nel Kingsbridge, Devon, England, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Whalesburghが約1328年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Sir John De Walesbreu , Knightは15歳，母Joan de Bodruganは20歳であった。1340年にイギリスドールセトリメ インストリンセカでJohn de Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1412年にイギリスデボンキングスブリッジで85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Whalesburgh(이)가 대략 1328년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Bodrugan(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1340년 영국 도르세트 리 인스트린세카에서 John de Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1412년 영국 데폰 킨그스브리지에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Whalesburgh nasceu aproximadamente 1328, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Bodrugan, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Beauchamp em 1340, em Ryme Instrinseca, Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1412, em Kingsbridge, Devon, Inglaterra, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Whalesburgh родилась около 1328 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Bodrugan, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Beauchamp в 1340 г. в местности рим инстринсека, дорсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1412 г. в местности кингсбридж, девон, Англия в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Whalesburgh nació aproximadamente 1328, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Joan de Bodrugan, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John de Beauchamp en 1340, en Ryme Instrinseca, Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1412, en Kingsbridge, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 85 años.
